content_body:
Just 90 minutes north of Atlanta, you will be transported into another world where mountain beauty and tranquility embrace you. Leave the hustle and bustle of the city and visit Blue Ridge, where you can relax and unwind with family and friends in any of our luxury Blue Ridge cabins. 

For over 20 years, we have been committed to providing you and your group an unforgettable time in Blue Ridge, the heart of a beloved North Georgia region.

Blue Ridge Luxury Cabin Rentals


Above the Timberline

Your Blue Ridge experience begins upon arrival at your tastefully appointed cabin rental. Choose a cabin with mountain views, river views, lake views, or a cozy cabin in the woods. All of our Blue Ridge cabins are close to all the best North GA Mountains things to do so you don't have to travel half a day to enjoy your stay.

In an effort to make your Blue Ridge experience even more memorable, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers concierge suggestions to make planning your mountain getaway simple and effortless. Make sure to explore our sample trip itineraries as well! With a treasure trove of local knowledge and experience, our team is dedicated to providing the best insight for your travel needs. 

Concierge Services

Our recommended concierge services deliver personalized hospitality to make your vacation easy and effortless. Each service can accommodate particular needs and occasions.

If you're planning a romantic getaway, an in-cabin couples massage adds a special touch. Large groups appreciate having a list of caterers and personal chefs for their retreats. For the guys coming to Blue Ridge, a fly-fishing trip is in order. North GA Trout Fishing provides all the equipment needed for an exhilarating day on the river.

Explore our recommendations for the following options!

  • Massage
  • Personal Chef-Catering
  • Transportation
  • Fly-fishing Guides

Blue Ridge Things to Do

Your luxury vacation rental is supremely located only minutes away from the outdoor adventures, scenic views, and the Southern charm of Blue Ridge. 

Families and groups alike love to vacation in Blue Ridge, GA, and we have compiled a comprehensive list of the best family-friendly activities while visiting here. No matter what time of year you visit Blue Ridge, each season has its own special variety of excursions and adventures. Blue Ridge is also extremely pet-friendly, so there is plenty of room for your furry friend!

  • Top 20 Activities for Blue Ridge, GA
  • Family Fun Activities for Kids
  • Spring Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA
  • Summer Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA
  • Fall Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA
  • Winter Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA
  • Rainy Day Things To Do Guide
  • Much More

Large Group Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge


Courtesy of Campus Outreach of UGA

Family Reunions: In addition to vacationing in our incredible collection of large cabin rentals, there is so much to do in the Blue Ridge, GA area! Check out our concierge services and activities list to make the most of your memorable trip to Blue Ridge.

Corporate Retreats: Nothing erases the stress and issues of the workplace more effectively than immersing employees in the beautiful, natural setting of the mountains in Blue Ridge. Build trust and teamwork with team-building excursions during the day, or go fishing along the Toccoa River, then relax in our luxury mountain homes for meals that just taste better here. Put your employees in a happy place, and watch their minds and hearts open up to the opportunities ahead.

Church Retreats: Whether it be the sound of the Toccoa River rushing by, the swaying trees, or the mountain vistas, Blue Ridge is an ideal place to meditate on what is important. With peaceful and beautiful hiking trails, mountain grandeur, and luxurious lodging at our mountain homes, your group is sure to appreciate the blessings of Blue Ridge.

Couples Retreats: Our large cabin rentals are ideal for couples who love to experience a mountain getaway together. Enjoy private ensuite bathrooms, spacious bedrooms, and lodge interiors. Fully stocked kitchens make meal prep and planning a breeze. Alfresco dining to take in the breathtaking North GA beauty that surrounds is featured in our large lodges.

Call us today at 706-432-2140 so we can help you plan your Blue Ridge, GA vacation.
title: The Blue Ridge Experience
